name: ChatMessage
description: Sender-context wrapper for a chat message: avatar, name, bubble content, and metadata. API mirrors industry convention (Astryx ChatMessage); the bubble color follows sender, and sender-based alignment flips via layoutByProp — user messages render right-aligned (row-reverse root, end-aligned body) on both surfaces.

props.name: sender
props.description: Who sent it — drives the bubble color scheme.

props.name: name
props.description: Sender name shown above the message body.

slots.description: Timestamp and delivery status below the bubble.
